hero.eyebrowText: Live payments feed — track MRR the moment it hits
hero.sub: More Data Fast is a dashboard layer on top of DataFast — assemble the widgets you actually read. KPIs, live events, revenue, cohorts. Dense, editorial, exportable. Built by one dev, for operators.
hero.meta1: Works with DataFast out of the box

value.label: Why
value.title1: DataFast gives you the data. MDF gives you the
value.lead: Three things your analytics tab won't do on its own.
value.card1Title: A dashboard that fits your head.
value.card1Body: Drag, drop, resize. Per-widget date ranges. Pin the six numbers you check at 9am; hide the ones you don't. Persistent across sessions, per site.
value.card2Body: Live events feed, live payments feed, crosshair-synced charts. See a checkout land while you're still reading the email that mentioned it.
value.card3Body: Tabular nums, 1px hairlines, JetBrains Mono on anything numeric. No marketing fluff between you and the number. Share read-only URLs with your co-founder.

showcase.label: Widgets
showcase.title: A widget library that feels like the CLI.
showcase.lead: Seven widget families, all wired to DataFast, all live.
showcase.copyTitle: Every widget is editable, resizable, and live.
showcase.copyBody: No templates. Start empty, add what you need, move it where it makes sense. The chrome stays out of the way.
showcase.item1Desc: 6-up numeric strip. Visitors, sessions, revenue, conv., bounce, session duration.
showcase.item2Desc: area chart with crosshair tooltips, dynamic ranges.
showcase.item5Desc: every pageview, signup, custom event — as it happens.
showcase.item6Desc: Stripe-connected; MRR the second it posts.

compare.label: vs DataFast alone
compare.title: What you get on top of the analytics you already have.
compare.lead: MDF sits beside DataFast, not instead of it. Events still ingest into DataFast; we add the dashboarding layer.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One price. All widgets. All sites.
pricing.lead: Priced like a tool, not a platform. Cancel anytime.
pricing.copyTitle: Stop budgeting for seats you don't need.
pricing.copyBody: A flat price that covers every widget, every site, every team member. We built this for ourselves — the pricing reflects that.
pricing.bullet4: Cancel in one click from Settings
pricing.bullet5: Built by a solo dev who answers support himself
pricing.hintMonthly: billed monthly · vat excluded · cancel anytime
pricing.hintYearly: billed yearly · 2 months free · vat excluded · cancel anytime

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions we actually get.
faq.q1: Do I need a DataFast account first?
faq.a1: Yes. MDF reads from your existing DataFast workspace — it doesn't replace ingestion. Connect your API key in Settings and we'll pull the last 30 days automatically.
faq.a2: No free plan, but a full 14-day trial with every feature unlocked and no credit card required. If you hit day 14 and it's not for you, the dashboards just read-only until you upgrade.
faq.a3: Yes. MDF ships as a single Docker image with Postgres and a mounted data volume. Encryption keys live in data/master.key; you back those up, we don't hold them.
faq.a4: You keep read-only access until the end of your billing period, then your dashboards freeze. We don't delete anything — re-subscribe and everything comes back exactly as it was.
faq.a5: One developer. That's the whole team. Support emails get answered within 24h on weekdays; the product moves fast because there's no roadmap committee.
faq.q6: Will MDF get slower as my site scales?
faq.a6: Queries are cached and incrementally refreshed. We run the same dashboard on a site doing 2M events/month in ~800ms P95. If you're bigger than that, talk to us.

finalCta.sub: Plug in your DataFast workspace. Build a dashboard you actually check. Unsubscribe if we're not it.
finalCta.hint: from € 5 / mo · € 50 / year · cancel anytime · no card required
